description: Node-level infrastructure metrics including CPU, memory, disk, network, and I/O pressure for Countly cluster nodes

targets.expr: avg(node_load5{cluster=~"$cluster", node=~"$node"} / count without (cpu, mode)(node_cpu_seconds_total{cluster=~"$cluster", mode="idle", node=~"$node"}))

sum by (namespace, pod)(rate(container_cpu_cfs_throttled_periods_total{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) / sum by (namespace, pod)(rate(container_cpu_cfs_periods_total{cluster=~"$cluster", namespace=~"$namespace"}[5m])) > 0.01

title: Node & Infrastructure
